column4: Ask anything in plain English + proactively surface issues, advisory only

column4: NL Q&A over live data; typos/shorthand/jargon understood

column7: How non-technical is the least technical user?

column4: Agent chains tools to reach a conclusion, not single-shot
column5: Real questions need multi-step investigation; the differentiator vs a dashboard

column4: Clarity on how far autonomy goes; today strictly advisory
column5: Defines the entire safety model, tool set, and liability

column4: Right set of tools beyond the 6 read-only analytics tools

column4: Holds session context; ideally recalls equipment history

column4: Right-sized open-weights model per task; everything on-prem

column4: Regression-proof quality check before every release
